ClinicaData.title: ClinicaData
ClinicaData.description: The main data object containing all services, banners, curiosities, testimonials, bookings, users, and settings for the clinic.

services.description: List of services and combos offered by the clinic.

banners.description: Promotional banners displayed on the home page.

curiosity.description: Fun facts or curiosities about massotherapy.

users.description: Admin users permitted to access the dashboard.

settings.description: General settings for the clinic (colors, links, maps, fonts).

/clinica_data/main.description: Single document path representing the entire cloud configuration and data.
